creator: takefu@airport.fm
text:
Created attachment 230902
hamlib-4.4.patch

The distribution tarball uses patch applied to the following master branch because the build is broken.

https://github.com/Hamlib/Hamlib/commit/baea7e8c9a30ddf051cd04deec1b715856e4ed83#diff-9df9e2c313e694cf242534e90c1187fe119fac8de7c304ae438de0736209953b.patch

The error message in build is as follows.
hamlibpy_wrap.c:48824:80: error: use of undeclared identifier 'RIG_FUNCTION_SEND_VOICE_MEM'; did you mean 'RIG_FUNCTION_SEND_MORSE'?
  SWIG_Python_SetConstant(d, "RIG_FUNCTION_SEND_VOICE_MEM",SWIG_From_int((int)(RIG_FUNCTION_SEND_VOICE_MEM)));
                                                                               ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
                                                                               RIG_FUNCTION_SEND_MORSE

hamlibtcl_wrap.c:45844:86: error: use of undeclared identifier 'RIG_FUNCTION_SEND_VOICE_MEM'; did you mean 'RIG_FUNCTION_SEND_MORSE'?
  SWIG_Tcl_SetConstantObj(interp, "RIG_FUNCTION_SEND_VOICE_MEM", SWIG_From_int((int)(RIG_FUNCTION_SEND_VOICE_MEM)));
                                                                                     ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
                                                                                     RIG_FUNCTION_SEND_MORSE
